falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate extreme market pressure, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting a potential reversal or breakout rather than continuation of the unknown phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% with volume > 2x the 30-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal a strong bullish trend emergence, invalidating the HOLD verdict by demonstrating clear directional momentum contrary to the pattern's implied stagnation.

falsification_conditions.condition: A confirmed bullish engulfing pattern forms at the 78.6% Fibonacci retracement level with RSI > 65
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This technical pattern would indicate a high-probability reversal from the current unknown phase, directly contradicting the HOLD signal and suggesting a move against the bottom_2024_aug pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
